mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.taken_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT , pi.path AS image_path FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images pi ON p.id = pi.post_id AND pi.sort_order = 0 WHERE p.id = #{post_id}
SELECT , pi.path AS image_path FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images pi ON p.id = pi.post_id AND pi.sort_order = 0 WHERE p.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, caption, has_location, latitude, longitude, taken_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{caption}, #{hasLocation}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{takenAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
